series_metadata.series_title: Subrogation Documents where no Workers'' Compensation claim can be located
series_metadata.series_description: The Court Documents where no workers’ compensation claim can be located are courtesy copies of court documents sent to the bureau. Often it is immediately unclear why these documents have been sent to the subrogation unit, because the documents do not involve a workers’ compensation claim. However, because the potential exists that a workers’ compensation claim could be filed later, these documents are maintained.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from date of receipt in case needed litigation. If no activity
